features: 【240 Pcs French Press On Nails Kit】- This Short False Nails Kit includes 240pcs French style square press on nails glossy, all necessary tools as files*1, stainless steels cuticle pusher*1,nail glue*1 and the box with press on nails. Create a professional French manicure at home with no salon wait time. The press on nails short is perfect for DIY nail lovers!

【Premium Quality Fake Nails】- Made with high-quality, non-toxic ABS material, our short stick on nails are chip-resistant, durable, and comfortable to wear. Designed to mimic natural nails, they offer a smooth finish without bubbles or stinging, ideal for long-lasting wear.

【15 Sizes for a Perfect Fit】-This french short press on nails kitoffers 15 different sizes, making it easy to find the perfect fit for every nail shape and size. Whether your nails are slender or wide, the sizing system ensures a precise and comfortable fit. No more guesswork—simply choose the size that suits you for a natural, seamless look. Perfect for both beginners and experienced users.

【Easy Application & No Drying Time】-Achieve a flawless French manicure in minutes! Simply clean your nails, apply the included glue, press the nails on, and hold for 15 seconds. No drying time or mess, just perfect nails in minutes. The strong adhesive ensures a secure bond, and the nails are easy to remove without damaging your natural nails. Save time and effort—enjoy a salon-quality manicure at home without the hassle!

【Versatile & Perfect for Any Occasion】- FFrom casual daily wear to formal events, these French press-on nails add a chic touch to any look. Whether it’s for a wedding, party, or just a day at work, these nails elevate your style effortlessly. They also make a fantastic gift for women and girls who love DIY nails, with 240 nails to match every occasion. Enjoy up to 4 weeks of stunning, chip-free nails with no salon required!
description: Product Description High-Quality Short Square French Tip Press on Nails Kit Maggidea is dedicated to the design and development of fake nails, working with a number of brand designers to provide a higher quality salon level nail experience that can be done at home. Advanced Layering Technology for Superior Comfort Why settle for ordinary plastic? Maggidea introduces a revolutionary fake nail kit designed for the modern woman. Chip-Free & Bubble-Free: Crafted from premium ABS, these nude french false nails are engineered to be durable and flexible. The material is non-toxic and breathable, ensuring a comfortable wear without the pressure of traditional acrylics. No Base Coat Needed: Featuring a patented pre-applied primer and base coat, these tips offer superior adhesion. This unique structure mimics soft gel tips, giving you a natural look that fits perfectly against the cuticle. Instant Salon Results: Achieve a flawless DIY manicure at home in minutes. The glossy finish and white tip design provide a classic French manicure decoration effect without the salon price tag. 15 Sizes for a Perfect Custom Fit Unlike competitors with only 10-12 sizes, our 240pcs square press on nails come in 15 different sizes. This upgraded database ensures you find the exact match for your nail bed, whether flat or curved. Say Goodbye to Gaps: Experience the Perfect Fit Ill-fitting nails are the main reason for pop-offs and discomfort. Unlike generic brands that offer limited sizes, Maggidea provides 15 specialized sizes to ensure a seamless match for every finger, from thumb to pinky. Seamless Cuticle Line: Our press-on nails are designed with a tapered cuticle edge that sits flush against your natural nail, eliminating the "fake" ridge that causes hair snagging. For All Nail Beds: Whether you have flat or curved nail beds, our flexible ABS material contours to your shape, preventing the air pockets that lead to lifting. Natural Look: The result is a manicure that looks like it was sculpted in a salon, not just glued on. All In One Manicure Tool Kit We provide everything you need: a stainless steel cuticle pusher, a dual-sided file, and strong nail glue. The metal pusher allows for precise prep, ensuring your fake nails white tip stay on for up to 2 weeks. HOW TO USE Step 1: File the sides and cuticle area for an accurate fit with cuticle pusher. Step 2: Using the free alcohol pad inside to clean nails and keep you nails dry. Step 3: Select the correct size nails for each finger or trim and file them to any length and shape you like by using nail file. Apply glue to the nails. Step 4: Press the false nails on your own nails and hold for 10 seconds.Squeeze out all the air from the pasting area. Step 5: Trim the excess part by nail file and finish!Please don't wash your hand within 2 hours when you wear the nails. TIPS: 1.You’d better use glue which will make the false nails stay longer on you nails. 2.Adhesive stickers make fake nails reusable, but glue can’t. We recommend that you use the jelly glue a few times first and the glue last. 3.Don't make your hands wet before you wear the false nails. 4.Try to avoid soaking your hands for a long time when you are wearing them.Water will loose your glue then nails will drop!
